products.title: The 2026 Astro Planner
products.body_html:
This one-of-a-kind resource doesn’t just help you stay on top of your schedule; it shows you how to plot the year of your dreams and work with the astrology as it unfolds. Packed with 300 pages of practical magic, it was crafted by a team of real astrologers, which means it has everything you need to plan your days with extra planetary support. It even comes with astrological cheat sheets, rituals, a digital PDF that you can access on the go, and real-time astro readings so you have all the info to manifest your best year yet.

P.S. If print isn’t for you, we have a fully digital version too.

products.title: Washi Tape Bundle
products.body_html: Your mood boards are about to get cuter. Our Washi Tape Bundle includes four unique rolls decorated with fun astro imagery and affirmations for manifesting. Consider it the perfect addition to any stationery set, journal, crafting party, or collage kit. Plus, each roll is compostable and made with non-toxic adhesive and low-VOC soy inks.

products.title: Zodiac Mugs
products.body_html:
These limited-edition Zodiac Mugs come in 12 unique color combos to reflect each sign’s mood. Printed with safe, low-VOC, environmentally conscious inks, each ceramic mug can hold 11 oz of your favorite beverage and keep it toasty. With a roomy handle and a classic shape, they’re the perfect companions for your morning rituals or cozy evenings in.

P.S. We won’t blame you if you get one for each sign in your big 3.

products.title: “I Blame the Astrology” Cap
products.body_html:
This limited-run baseball cap is perfect for bad hair days, retrogrades, and every day in between. Made from 100% embroidered cotton, this one-size-fits-all tan-and-green hat has a six-panel design, an adjustable metal clasp, tonal under-peak lining, and a washed finish to give it that stylish, casual look. Prepare for people to ask you where you got it

P.S. We made a very limited quantity of these caps, so once they’re gone, they’re gone for good.

products.title: The Digital 2026 Astro Planner
products.body_html:
The Digital 2026 Astro Planner brings 300 pages of rituals, reflections, exercises, astro cheat sheets, planetary movements, and daily and monthly calendars to your phone, tablet, or computer. That means you can map out your year, track your intention for each day, and make the most of the current astrology, even when you’re on the go. Plus, each digital planner includes a customizable birth chart and four sheets of collage art. Here’s to manifesting the year of your dreams.

Looking for the print version? Click here.

products.title: The 2026 AstroCal
products.body_html:
The 2026 AstroCal is a digital resource that allows you to sync the planetary movements of the day to the calendar on your devices and keep your schedule aligned with the sky. It also includes transit summaries to help you work with the astrology as it unfolds. It’s just the thing to give your daily to-dos an astro boost.

The 2026 AstroCal is included with the 2026 Astro Planner, and does not need to be purchased separately.

products.title: You Were Born for This: Astrology for Radical Self-Acceptance
products.body_html: In this New York Times Best Seller, Chani Nicholas shows you how your birth chart reveals your unique life path, purpose, gifts, challenges, and opportunities. Marrying the historic traditions of astrology with a modern approach, You Were Born for This explains the key components of your birth chart — i.e., your Sun (your life’s purpose), your Moon (your physical and emotional needs), and your ascendant and its ruler (your motivation for living life and the steersperson of your ship) — in an easy-to-use, choose-your-own-adventure style. Through journal prompts, reflection questions, and affirmations personal to your astrological makeup, it guides you along the path your chart has laid out for you so that you can live the life you were born to.

products.title: The Deck of Plenty
products.body_html: The Deck of Plenty contains 82 cards for affirmation and inspiration, and an accompanying wooden stand to display them on your desk or altar. On each card, you’ll find either a written message or an illustration to spark new thoughts, prompt ideas, and support you on your journey. The best part: There’s no wrong way to use it. You can pull a card whenever you like. For added abundance, we recommend using this deck in conjunction with the CHANI app.

products.title: Planetary Salts
products.body_html: Our small-batch Planetary Salts come in an 8oz jar and are made with carefully selected, responsibly sourced ingredients that are directly connected to the planets that rule them. They also include rituals to help you harness the energy of their respective planets — bringing a blissful boost to any bath time. Whether you choose to honor one of the most important planets in your chart (e.g., the planet that rules your rising sign), work with the current transits, or strengthen your connection to a specific planet, the ingredients and accompanying affirmations will add potency to your self-care practice and deepen your relationship with astrology.

products.title: Planetary Candles
products.body_html: Our small-batch Planetary Candles are made with pure beeswax and carefully selected, responsibly sourced ingredients that are directly connected to the planets that rule them. Plus, each 14-oz candle was hand-poured at an auspicious time for its respective planet and includes an affirmation to help you call in that planet’s power. Whether you choose to honor one of the most important planets in your chart (e.g., the planet that rules your rising sign), work with the current transits, or strengthen your connection to a specific planet, the scents and accompanying rituals will add potency to your altars and deepen your relationship with astrology.

products.title: Healing Happens Here Sweatshirt by Gifted
products.body_html: Inspired by FreeFrom’s documentary, Survivor Made, this hoodie is made by — and fully invested in — survivors of gender-based violence. With a versatile gray-and-pink color palette, an extra-soft fleece lining, and dual screen-printed messages, it serves as a helpful reminder that healing is inevitable when we use our purchasing power for social change.

products.title: Survivor Made Sweatshirt by Gifted
products.body_html: Inspired by FreeFrom’s documentary, Survivor Made, this classic pullover is made by — and fully invested in — survivors of gender-based violence. With a versatile olive-green-and-pink color palette, an extra-soft fleece lining, and a bold screen-printed message, it has all the details to get the right conversations started.

products.title: Zodiac Candles by Gifted
products.body_html: These small-batch Zodiac Candles are made of pure soy wax and a variety of carefully selected, responsibly sourced ingredients that are directly connected to the planets that rule them. Whether you choose to honor your Sun sign, work with your ascendant, or get cozy with your natal Moon, the scents and accompanying stones will help you set intentions that align with your chart.

products.title: Sun Sign Essential Oil by Gifted
products.body_html: These essential oil blends are made with a variety of carefully selected, responsibly sourced ingredients that are directly connected to the planets that rule them. As you honor your natal Sun, your chosen blend will help you set intentions that align with your identity and where you shine.

products.title: Moon Sign Essential Oil by Gifted
products.body_html: These essential oil blends are made with a variety of carefully selected, responsibly sourced ingredients that are directly connected to the planets that rule them. As you honor your natal Moon, your chosen blend will help you set intentions that align with your body, needs, and emotions.

products.title: Rising Sign Essential Oil by Gifted
products.body_html: These essential oil blends are made with a variety of carefully selected, responsibly sourced ingredients that are directly connected to the planets that rule them. As you honor your ascendant, your chosen blend will help you set intentions that align with your motivation for life.

products.title: Zodiac Card Pack
products.body_html: Designed by team CHANI and crafted by ELLI Greetings in Los Angeles, CA, this super-cute card pack includes 12 handmade zodiac cards (one for every sign) that are blank on the inside for easy personalization. Plus, they’re packaged with eco-friendly kraft envelopes. Your friends are gonna love ‘em.

products.title: Winter Solstice Candle
products.body_html: Our small-batch Winter Solstice Candle was hand-poured at an auspicious time for the Sun (when Sol was at the December solstice point) and includes an affirmation, which reads: “The seeds I am planting already contain the blueprints of their potential; I don’t have to force them to unfold.” Made of responsibly sourced beeswax, each 14-oz candle was crafted in Los Angeles by Earthy Corazon and is topped with sun stones that are imbued with solar magic.

products.title: Solar Return Candle
products.body_html: Our small-batch Solar Return Candle was hand-poured at an auspicious time for the Sun (when Sol was at home in Leo conjunct Venus) and includes an affirmation, which reads: “I love myself on the way to all my wins. If I forget this step, I miss the point completely. I am the goal.” You can use it to honor your latest spin around the Sun, set intentions for the coming year, and manifest the bounty that is your birthright.

products.title: The Gifted Beanie
products.body_html: Made in Los Angeles, CA, this chunky olive-green beanie features classic rib detailing and a black-and-white Gifted patch that’s guaranteed to get the right conversations started. Just note: This is a limited-edition drop, which means only 100 were made. So once it’s gone, it’s gone for good.
